Scaled Dot-Product Attention & Transformer Layers central claim
Scaled dot-product attention forms queries, keys, and values, uses scaled query-key dot products to produce row-wise attention weights, and mixes value vectors with those weights.

FlashAttention: IO-Aware Attention central claim
FlashAttention computes exact attention while using tiling and online softmax to reduce high-bandwidth-memory traffic instead of materializing the full T x T attention matrix.

Rotary Position Embeddings (RoPE) central claim
